---
title: "All Quests"
subtitle: "Your Complete Rust Adventure Collection"
---

## 🗺️ Complete Quest List

Here is the complete Rust Quest collection. Each quest is practical, beginner-friendly, and challenge-based.

### 🌱 Rust Beginner Quests

1. **[Variables - Your Starter Toolkit](lessons/01-variables.qmd)** - Immutability and `mut`
2. **[Data Types - The Shape of Data](lessons/02-data-types.qmd)** - Rust primitive and string types
3. **[Conditionals - Choose Your Path](lessons/03-conditionals.qmd)** - `if`, `else if`, and boolean logic
4. **[Loops - Repeat with Confidence](lessons/04-loops.qmd)** - `loop`, `while`, and `for`
5. **[Vectors - Collecting Data](lessons/05-lists.qmd)** - `Vec<T>` for growing collections
6. **[Functions - Reusable Steps](lessons/06-functions.qmd)** - Parameters and return values
7. **[HashMaps - Keys and Values](lessons/07-dictionaries.qmd)** - Fast lookups with key-value pairs
8. **[Fibonacci - Pattern Practice](lessons/08-fibonacci.qmd)** - Build confidence with sequence generation

### 🌿 Skill-Building Quests

9. **[Sorting - Organizing Data](lessons/09-sorting.qmd)** - Order vectors with built-ins
10. **[Number Game - Guess and Check](lessons/10-number-game.qmd)** - Use loops and conditionals together
11. **[Recursion - Functions Calling Themselves](lessons/11-recursion.qmd)** - Solve with smaller subproblems
12. **[Complexity - Why Speed Matters](lessons/12-complexity.qmd)** - Compare growth patterns
13. **[Iterative Loops - Pick the Right Loop](lessons/13-iterative-loops.qmd)** - Select the right repetition tool

### 🌳 Rust Patterns Quests

14. **[Functions Part 2 - Non-Returning](lessons/14-functions-non-returning.qmd)** - Action-oriented functions
15. **[Functions Part 3 - Returning Values](lessons/15-functions-returning.qmd)** - Compute and return results
16. **[Closures - Quick Function Tools](lessons/16-lambda-functions.qmd)** - Inline anonymous behavior
17. **[Higher-Order Functions](lessons/17-higher-order-functions.qmd)** - Pass behavior into functions
18. **[Wrappers - Add Behavior Around Functions](lessons/18-decorators.qmd)** - Decorator-like patterns
19. **[Structs and Impl - Rust Blueprints](lessons/19-classes.qmd)** - Class-equivalent modeling in Rust

---

## 📈 Track Your Progress

- [ ] Quest 1: Variables
- [ ] Quest 2: Data Types
- [ ] Quest 3: Conditionals
- [ ] Quest 4: Loops
- [ ] Quest 5: Vectors
- [ ] Quest 6: Functions
- [ ] Quest 7: HashMaps
- [ ] Quest 8: Fibonacci
- [ ] Quest 9: Sorting
- [ ] Quest 10: Number Game
- [ ] Quest 11: Recursion
- [ ] Quest 12: Complexity
- [ ] Quest 13: Iterative Loops
- [ ] Quest 14: Functions Part 2
- [ ] Quest 15: Functions Part 3
- [ ] Quest 16: Closures
- [ ] Quest 17: Higher-Order Functions
- [ ] Quest 18: Wrappers
- [ ] Quest 19: Structs and Impl

::: {.tip-box}
**🎯 Challenge**: Can you complete all 19 Rust quests and re-type each example from memory?
:::
